description_long: This stereo sound system consists of two rectangular speaker units with a modern, minimalist design. The main body of each speaker is a matte blue color, with the front face featuring a large black panel, likely the speaker grille. One of the speakers has a prominent circular control element on its lower front, highlighted in a contrasting pink color, suggesting a volume knob or multifunctional dial. The rear of each unit displays a label with technical information and safety warnings, indicating attention to detail and authenticity. The side profiles reveal a slightly angled, wedge-like shape, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some internal metal components, and the speakers are compact enough for desktop or shelf placement in urban environments.
description: A pair of modern blue stereo speakers with black front grilles and a pink circular control dial, featuring a sleek, angular design and rear labels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue, wedge-shaped profile and the slight backward tilt of the speaker.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the black speaker grilles, with the right unit featuring a pink circular control dial at the bottom.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the wedge-shaped blue profile seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing both speakers' blue backs with white technical labels affixed near the bottom.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille is a solid black panel with no visible perforation or mesh pattern, giving it a smooth, minimalist appearance.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A single prominent circular control dial is located on the lower front of the right speaker, highlighted in pink; no other visible buttons or sliders are present.
